description_long: This is a classic, retro-style scooter with a vibrant red body and a sleek, streamlined design. The scooter features a prominent front shield, rounded fenders, and a black cushioned seat that appears comfortable for one or two riders. The handlebars are straight with visible hand grips and a central headlight, while the wheels are medium-sized with whitewall tires, adding to its vintage appeal. The rear section includes a small luggage rack and a taillight, and the side panels are slightly curved with vent details. The kickstand is visible beneath the deck, supporting the scooter in an upright position. The overall construction suggests a sturdy metal frame with some plastic and rubber components for comfort and functionality.
description: A retro red scooter with a black seat, whitewall tires, and a classic streamlined design. Features include a front shield, central headlight, and rear luggage rack.
description_view_0: Front-top view showing the wide front shield, handlebars, and the black seat with the rear luggage rack and taillight visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the scooter, the black seat, side vent, and the kickstand supporting the scooter.
description_view_2: Direct front view displaying the headlight, handlebars, and the broad front shield with the front wheel centered.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the scooter's profile, including the front fender, black seat, and rear vented panel.
attribute_deck_design: medium-length, slightly wide, smooth black surface with a subtle footrest area
